entry.content:
Docker 教程

01. Docker概念介绍

（文档原内容，概念介绍部分）

02. Docker的安装

本安装教程参考Docker官方文档。

1. 卸载旧版

yum remove docker \    docker-client \    docker-client-latest \    docker-common \    docker-latest \    docker-latest-logrotate \    docker-logrotate \    docker-engine \    docker-selinux

2. 配置Docker的yum库

sudo yum install -y yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2
sudo yum-config-manager –add-repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
sudo sed -i ‘s+download.docker.com+mirrors.aliyuncs.com/docker-ce+’ /etc/yum.repos.d/docker-ce.repo
sudo yum makecache fast

3. 安装Docker

yum install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin

4. 启动和校验

systemctl start dockersystemctl stop dockersystemctl restart dockersystemctl enable dockerdocker ps

5. 配置镜像加速

sudo mkdir -p /etc/dockersudo tee /etc/docker/daemon.json <<-'EOF'{  "registry-mirrors": ["https://asx4i3z8.mirror.aliyuncs.com"]}EOFsudo systemctl daemon-reloadsudo systemctl restart docker

03. 快速入门部署MySQL

1.1 部署MySQL

docker run -d \  --name mysql \  -p 3306:3306 \  -e TZ=Asia/Shanghai \  -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123 \  mysql

Docker 会自动搜索并下载 MySQL 镜像并运行容器，无需考虑操作系统环境。

1.2 命令解读

docker run -d : 创建并运行容器，后台运行--name mysql : 容器名称-p 3306:3306 : 端口映射-e TZ=Asia/Shanghai : 设置容器时区-e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123 : MySQL root密码mysql : 镜像名称

2. Docker基础

2.1 常见命令

命令说明
docker pull拉取镜像
docker push推送镜像到DockerRegistry
docker images查看本地镜像
docker run创建并运行容器
docker stop停止指定容器
docker start启动指定容器

2.2 数据卷

数据卷是容器目录与宿主机目录之间的映射桥梁，用于持久化和共享数据。

2.3 镜像

镜像分层叠加构成，每层都有唯一ID，Dockerfile 用于描述镜像构建过程。

2.3.2 Dockerfile 示例

# 基础镜像FROM openjdk:11.0-jre-busterENV TZ=Asia/ShanghaiRUN ln -snf /usr/share/zoneinfo/$TZ /etc/localtime && echo $TZ > /etc/timezoneCOPY docker-demo.jar /app.jarENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app.jar"]

2.3.3 构建镜像

docker build -t docker-demo:1.0 .

3. 项目部署

示例部署黑马商城，包括 MySQL、Nginx、Java 项目容器。

3.3 DockerCompose

通过 docker-compose.yml 管理多个关联容器。

version: "3.8"services:  mysql:    image: mysql    container_name: mysql    ports:      - "3306:3306"    environment:      TZ: Asia/Shanghai      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: 123    volumes:      - "./mysql/conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d"      - "./mysql/data:/var/lib/mysql"      - "./mysql/init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d"    networks:      - hm-net  hmall:    build:       context: .      dockerfile: Dockerfile    container_name: hmall    ports:      - "8080:8080"    networks:      - hm-net    depends_on:      - mysql  nginx:    image: nginx    container_name: nginx    ports:      - "18080:18080"      - "18081:18081"    volumes:      - "./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf"      - "./nginx/html:/usr/share/nginx/html"    depends_on:      - hmall    networks:      - hm-netnetworks:  hm-net:    name: hmall

entry.title: 有点意思
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment
